Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 3 0 0}And that one student who passed away last year in an incident, um... Aragaki-senpai?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 4 0 0}They all look so young, so maybe this is from when they started high school? I wonder if Aragaki-senpai also used to live in the dorms.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 5 0 0}I always thought he looked kinda scary, but in this picture...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 4 6 0 0}He seems so kind. It's a really nice picture.[n]{f 1 1}
